productions.name: declaration
productions.syntax: declaration ::= record_type_decl | type_decl | error_decl | function_decl | procedure_decl ;

productions.name: function_decl
productions.syntax: function_decl ::= "function" IDENT "(" [ param_list ] ")" "returns" return_type [ contract_block ] "is" { stmt } "end" IDENT ;

productions.name: procedure_decl
productions.syntax: procedure_decl ::= "procedure" IDENT "(" [ param_list ] ")" [ contract_block ] "is" { stmt } "end" IDENT ;

productions.name: stmt
productions.syntax: stmt ::= let_stmt | field_assign_stmt | assign_stmt | return_stmt | if_stmt | while_stmt | case_stmt | check_stmt | call_stmt ;

productions.name: while_stmt
productions.syntax: while_stmt ::= "while" expr invariant_clause { invariant_clause } [ variant_clause ] "do" loop_block "end" "while" ;

productions.name: equality
productions.syntax: equality ::= comparison | equality "=" comparison | equality "!=" comparison ;

productions.name: comparison
productions.syntax: comparison ::= sum | comparison "<" sum | comparison "<=" sum | comparison ">" sum | comparison ">=" sum ;

productions.name: sum
productions.syntax: sum ::= product | sum "+" product | sum "-" product ;

productions.name: product
productions.syntax: product ::= unary | product "*" unary | product "/" unary ;

productions.name: atom
productions.syntax: atom ::= STRING_LITERAL | DOUBLE_LITERAL | INTEGER_LITERAL | "true" | "false" | "success" | "failure" | "value" | "error" | array_literal | IDENT "{" named_arg_list "}" | field_path | IDENT "[" expr "]" | qualified_name "(" [ arg_list ] ")" | IDENT | "(" expr ")" ;

productions.name: LINE_COMMENT_CHARACTER
productions.syntax: LINE_COMMENT_CHARACTER ::= LETTER | DIGIT | PRINTABLE_SYMBOL | SPACE | TAB | DOUBLE_QUOTE | BACKSLASH ;

productions.name: STRING_CHARACTER
productions.syntax: STRING_CHARACTER ::= LETTER | DIGIT | PRINTABLE_SYMBOL | SPACE | TAB ;
